mapper.select:
WITH latest_policy AS ( -- 최종 안전보건 경영방침 SELECT write_year AS latest_write_year, doc_type AS latest_doc_type, doc_no AS latest_doc_no FROM esg.tb_hse_policy WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND use_yn = 'Y' AND write_year = (SELECT TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYY') AS current_year) ORDER BY doc_no::integer DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT -- 목록 조회 쿼리 본문 CONCAT(p.write_year, '-', p.doc_type, '-', p.doc_no) AS id, -- 안전보건 경영방침 ID p.content_header AS title, -- 안전보건 경영방침 제목 COALESCE(COUNT(s.doc_seq), 0) AS totalReplyCount, -- 총 근로자 의견수 CASE WHEN p.write_year = lp.latest_write_year AND p.doc_type = lp.latest_doc_type AND p.doc_no = lp.latest_doc_no THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS latest, -- 최종 여부 p.created_at AS createdAt -- 생성일시 FROM esg.tb_hse_policy p LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hse_policy_suggestion s ON p.write_year = s.write_year AND p.doc_type = s.doc_type AND p.doc_no = s.doc_no AND p.comp_id = s.comp_id AND s.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN latest_policy lp ON TRUE WHERE p.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND p.use_yn = 'Y'
AND p.write_year = #{year} -- :write_year
GROUP BY p.write_year, p.doc_type, p.doc_no, p.content_header, p.created_at, p.use_yn, lp.latest_write_year, lp.latest_doc_type, lp.latest_doc_no ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

WITH latest_policy AS ( -- 최종 안전보건 경영방침 SELECT write_year AS latest_write_year, doc_type AS latest_doc_type, doc_no AS latest_doc_no FROM esg.tb_hse_policy WHERE comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND write_year = (SELECT TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYY') AS current_year) AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY doc_no::integer DESC LIMIT 1 ), user_agreement AS ( -- 조회자 동의 여부 SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS agreement FROM esg.tb_hse_policy_agreement a WHERE a.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND a.write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND a.doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND a.doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND a.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id LIMIT 1 ), recently_replies AS ( -- 최신 근로자 의견 목록 SELECT json_agg( json_build_object( 'id', s.id, 'content', s.content, 'createdAt', s.created_at, 'writer', json_build_object( 'hrId', s.hr_id, 'name', h.hr_nm, 'jobTitle', cd.jbrp_nm, 'orgName', o.orgn_nm, 'profileImageId', f.file_id ) ) ) AS replies FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(write_year,'-', doc_type, '-', doc_no, '-', doc_seq) AS id, comp_id, worker_suggestion AS content, hr_id, created_at -- 작성일시 FROM esg.tb_hse_policy_suggestion WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 5 ) s LEFT JOIN esg.v_hr_info h ON s.hr_id = h.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file f ON f.target_type = 'hrImg' AND f.target_id = h.hr_id AND f.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info o ON h.orgn_id = o.orgn_id AND o.comp_id = s.comp_id AND o.use_yn = 'Y' left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = h.jbrp AND jbrp.use_yn ='Y' ), replies_count AS ( SELECT COUNT(doc_seq) FROM esg.tb_hse_policy_suggestion WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND use_yn = 'Y' ) SELECT -- 상제 조회 쿼리 본문 CONCAT(p.write_year, '-', p.doc_type, '-', p.doc_no) AS id, -- 안전보건 경영방침 ID p.content_header AS title, -- 안전보건 경영방침 제목 CASE WHEN p.write_year = lp.latest_write_year AND p.doc_type = lp.latest_doc_type AND p.doc_no = lp.latest_doc_no THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS latest, -- 최종 여부 ua.agreement, -- 조회자의 방침 동의 여부 rc.count AS totalReplyCount, -- 총 근로자 의견 수 rr.replies AS recentlyReplies, -- 최신 근로자 의견 p.created_at AS createdAt FROM esg.tb_hse_policy p LEFT JOIN latest_policy lp ON TRUE LEFT JOIN user_agreement ua ON TRUE LEFT JOIN recently_replies rr ON TRUE LEFT JOIN replies_count rc ON TRUE WHERE p.write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND p.doc_type = #{docType}-- :doc_type AND p.doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND p.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND p.use_yn = 'Y'

WITH latest_policy AS ( -- 최종 안전보건 경영방침 SELECT write_year AS latest_write_year, doc_type AS latest_doc_type, doc_no AS latest_doc_no FROM esg.tb_hse_policy WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT -- 상제 조회 쿼리 본문 CONCAT(p.write_year, p.doc_no) AS target_id, p.doc_type AS target_type, p.data_type, -- 0001 이면 title, content, footer로 PDF 생성, 0002면 이미지 파일로 PDF 생성 (2. 안전보건 경영방침 이미지 파일 조회 참조) CASE WHEN p.write_year = lp.latest_write_year AND p.doc_type = lp.latest_doc_type AND p.doc_no = lp.latest_doc_no THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS latest, -- 최종 여부 p.content_header AS title, -- 안전보건 경영방침 제목 p.content_body AS content, -- 안전보건 경영방침 제목 p.content_footer AS footer, -- 안전보건 경영방침 제목 p.created_at AS createdAt FROM esg.tb_hse_policy p LEFT JOIN latest_policy lp ON TRUE WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT file_id FROM esg.tb_sys_file f WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND target_type = 'PLC' -- 안전보건경영방침의 doc_type AND target_id= #{targetId} -- 안전보건경영방침의 write_year, doc_no AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY file_seq ASC
mapper.insert:
WITH my_id AS ( SELECT user_id FROM esg.v_hr_info h WHERE h.hr_id = #{hrId}
) INSERT INTO esg.tb_hse_policy_agreement( comp_id, write_year, doc_type, doc_no, hr_id, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, -- :comp_id #{writeYear}, -- :write_year #{docType}, -- :doc_type #{docNo}, -- :doc_no #{hrId}, -- :hr_id (SELECT user_id FROM my_id) -- created_by ) ON CONFLICT (comp_id, write_year, doc_type, doc_no, hr_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT(s.write_year, '-', s.doc_type, '-', s.doc_no, '-', s.doc_seq) AS id, -- 의견 ID s.worker_suggestion AS content, -- 의견 내용 s.created_at, -- 작성일시 JSON_BUILD_OBJECT( 'hrId', s.hr_id, 'name', h.hr_nm, 'jobTitle', jbrp.jbrp_nm, 'orgName', o.orgn_nm, 'profileImageId', f.file_id ) AS writer -- 작성자 정보 FROM esg.tb_hse_policy_suggestion s LEFT JOIN esg.v_hr_info h ON s.hr_id = h.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file f ON f.target_type = 'hrImg' AND f.target_id = h.hr_id AND f.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info o ON h.orgn_id = o.orgn_id AND o.comp_id = s.comp_id ANd o.use_yn = 'Y' left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = h.jbrp AND jbrp.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE s.write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND s.doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND s.doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND s.use_yn = 'Y' AND s.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id ORDER BY s.created_at DESC

WITH next_seq AS ( SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_seq::integer), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') AS next_doc_seq FROM esg.tb_hse_policy_suggestion WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND comp_id = #{compId} ), my_id AS ( SELECT user_id FROM esg.v_hr_info h WHERE h.hr_id = #{hrId}
) INSERT INTO esg.tb_hse_policy_suggestion ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, comp_id, hr_id, worker_suggestion, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, -- write_year #{docType}, -- doc_type #{docNo}, -- doc_no (SELECT next_doc_seq FROM next_seq), -- doc_seq #{compId}, -- comp_id #{hrId}, -- hr_id #{content}, -- worker_suggestion NOW(), -- created_at (SELECT user_id FROM my_id) -- created_by )
